title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 19 curation claim opened
body: Opened claim 5c371349-df9b-4e65-9667-7b431da37531 for legacy backlog batch 19 after live state showed 0 active claims and 0 active commit intents. Scope: next five pending legacy backlog entries from trinity Active Principles bootstrap extensions through design optionality. Processing in place only. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
